summary: Adjusted the opening handoff so Hester has already received August's confession at the end of chapter 9, while preserving the existing build into the public organizing scene and the dawn dig setup for chapter 11. No opening-scaffold rewrite was needed against the visible adjacent opening.
edits: Added a brief bridge line establishing that Cora and Dell brought August's confession to Hester the previous evening.
Reframed Dell's early dialogue as a sleepless repetition of the confession rather than first-time exposition.
Updated Hester's reaction beat so the morning scene sharpens already-known information instead of replacing chapter 9's ending.
